summary: InfoPage updated to show an RTL Hebrew section with a new heading and three expanded paragraphs using existing Tailwind styling patterns; routing/components appear unchanged. Two metadata/state files were also modified without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified project_state.json tracking new_feature_requests/status metadata unrelated to the Info page content/RTL requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asks to update the Info page content and RTL rendering, with constraints about routing and not touching frontend/src/components/ui; it does not request changes to project tracking/state files.
BuildRequest does not request regenerating or editing file summary documentation; only the Info page content/RTL behavior is in scope.
